name: PCCOOLER CPS C3 T500 ARGB PC Case, Dual-Chamber Mid-Tower ATX Case, Desktop Computer Case w/ 6 ARGB Fans Pre-installed w/ Fan Hub, Column-Free Design, Tempered Glass, USB 3.1 Gen 2 Type-C, White and PCCOOLER CPS YN1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W PSU, 12V-2x6 Cable, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, ECO Mode, 135mm FDB Fan, 10 Years Warranty

description: Bundle featuring a dual-chamber mid-tower ATX case with 6 ARGB fans and a 1000W 80+ Gold fully modular power supply for high-end PC builds.
